explanation.whatIsAlpha: Predicted forward return (10-day primary, blended with 5d/21d/63d horizons via IC-weighted ensemble). Positive = expected outperformance, negative = expected underperformance.
explanation.howToUse: Use alpha score as a TILT, not a binary signal. Top quintile (rank 1-20%) = strong long bias. Bottom quintile = avoid or short. Middle = neutral.
limitations: V9 predictions are monthly-horizon (best for swing trades, less useful for intraday)
Survivorship bias: universe is current S&P 500, not historical composition
Backtest Sharpe 3.81 includes execution configs tuned on the same holdout (treat with caution)
Model CV IC averages 0.01-0.04 per model (modest but consistent edge)
Predictions degrade after 30 days - always check staleness
explanation.auditFindings: bfill leakage in frac_diff fixed (fillna(0)), causal_centrality added to leaky features blacklist. No critical leakage remaining.
